name: ticket-triage-with-kb
description: Triage INC-7001 (MFA loop). Agent fetches the ticket + work notes + caller, searches the KB, proposes a remediation that matches KB-200, and does not write anything without confirmation.
input_message: Triage INC-7001 — walk me through what's known and propose a fix
expected_behavior: Calls servicenow_get_ticket(INC-7001), servicenow_list_work_notes(INC-7001), servicenow_get_user(caller) in parallel. Searches KB for 'MFA loop' or similar via servicenow_search_kb. Renders the standard triage shape: snapshot -> history -> KB-cited fix -> recommended next action. Does NOT call any write tool (servicenow_update_ticket_state, servicenow_add_work_note, etc.) without explicit confirmation.
